question:
89.) Your company is planning to use the AWS Cloud. But there is a management decision that resources need to split department wise. And the decision is tending towards managing multiple AWS accounts. Which of the following would help in effective management and also provide an efficient costing model?

A. AWS organizations
B. Amazon Dev Pay
C. AWS Trusted Advisor
D. AWS Cost Explorer
